_comment: Soundboks 'product hypermotion + specs' — the worked example (GOOSE-1783, V10 shipped 2026-05-28, $17.43 total / $4.99 marginal). Copy to config.json and edit. ONE 12-15s Seedance 2.0 i2v hypermotion clip of the hero product, diced into 5-6 segments, INTERCUT with 5-7 PIL kinetic-typography spec/CTA cards, capped by a real-logo end card, over a 124 BPM bass bed. 1080x1920 9:16. Two PAID model calls total (Seedance i2v + ElevenLabs Music); every text card + all assembly is free PIL/ffmpeg. Guard both paid calls with skip-if-exists so re-runs never re-bill.

prompt_blocks.1_style_anchor: STYLE ANCHOR: hypermotion product film, 124 BPM cuts, raw festival energy, modern.
prompt_blocks.2_cinematography: CINEMATOGRAPHY: ARRI Alexa, 50mm anamorphic, deep-focus, slight handheld, dusk lighting with magenta/blue rim, slight lens flare.
prompt_blocks.3_subject_environment: SUBJECT + ENVIRONMENT: Soundboks 4 (black) on beach festival deck, salt air, dusk lighting with magenta/blue rim, distant crowd silhouettes.
prompt_blocks.4_multi_shot_timecodes:
MULTI-SHOT TIMECODES:
  - 0-3s: crash-zoom from 6m wide to product hero
  - 3-6s: lateral orbit 180 degrees around the speaker
  - 6-10s: slow-mo dust kick from bass thump (dust in air, NOT on product)
  - 10-13s: pull-back to wide hero
  - 13-15s: final stillness hero
prompt_blocks.5_absolute_constraints:
ABSOLUTE CONSTRAINTS:
  - Locked label geometry: Soundboks wordmark stays sharp + horizontal across all cuts
  - No character contact: no hands, no people, no body parts touching product
  - No multi-product: only the one speaker, no clutter, no secondary items
  - Physics effects (dust, heat-shimmer, salt mist) in environment only, NOT on product surface
  - No text overlays inside the clip
  - Single product identity preserved across all camera moves (no shape morph, no color shift)

text_cards._note: Each card is a full-frame 1080x1920 PIL clip. hero_stat = the headline number (3D extrusion in accent color); the rest cycle italic + outline-echo / sparkle / shadow-stack. All on the dark industrial grain BG.

beat_structure._note: 25s default (5 specs). Dice the ONE 15s hypermotion into 6 segments at beat boundaries (decreasing lengths, first high-energy, last a settle), intercut in this order. 20s/30s variants documented in scripts/PIPELINE.md.

music.prompt: 124 BPM bass-driven party banger, driving low-end kick, festival energy, no vocals except a single rallying lyric hook near the end for the CTA/end-card sync. Kick drop at 1s for the cut into product hero, build through 10-20s, peak energy + lyric hook at 20s for the CTA reveal, lyric land at 22s for the brand wordmark inversion flash.

captions.note: no VO — the kinetic-typography spec cards carry the copy

end_card.note: real-logo brand end card, default on
